tabs.description: Care, feed, play, and inspect the selected pets.
Ask Wevito helpers for report-only task cards.
Manage saved links and local tool shortcuts.
Review local brain status, settings, and safety gates.
Preview and control approved autonomous scopes.
Search approved local documents when retrieval is enabled.
Inspect recent audit-ledger activity and helper evidence.
Curate and run reviewed local benchmark cases.
Review learning examples without training or promotion.

controls.description: Hosts primary and advanced Tool Hub navigation.
Shows Activity, Benchmarks, and Creative Lab without removing capability.
Creates safe helper task cards from plain language.
Opens the selected task report when a safe artifact path exists.
Builds the local docs index only when Local Docs is enabled.
Queries approved local docs without network access.
Shows each registered tool family with risk, approval, and catalog description.

toolFamilies.name: local_research_packet
toolFamilies.description: Prepare an offline/local research evidence packet.

toolFamilies.name: sprite_audit_report
toolFamilies.description: Audit sprite/runtime assets and write a report-only packet.

toolFamilies.name: get_pet_state
toolFamilies.description: Read current pet state without changing pets.

toolFamilies.name: code_review_report
toolFamilies.description: Review local code and prepare a report.

toolFamilies.name: code_patch_plan
toolFamilies.description: Plan a code change without editing files.

toolFamilies.name: build_proof_plan
toolFamilies.description: Prepare build proof commands; execution remains approval-gated.

toolFamilies.name: translate_text
toolFamilies.description: Translate user-provided text through approved local or deterministic paths.

toolFamilies.name: audio_assist_report
toolFamilies.description: Prepare audio/volume guidance without changing system audio.

toolFamilies.name: screen_capture_preview
toolFamilies.description: Prepare a screen-capture preview; execution remains approval-gated.

toolFamilies.name: retrieve_pet_memory
toolFamilies.description: Retrieve reviewed local pet memory rows.

toolFamilies.name: retrieve_from_memory
toolFamilies.description: Retrieve matching local memory rows for explicit chat-context deep dives.

toolFamilies.name: bookmark_for_benchmark
toolFamilies.description: Bookmark a chat message for a later benchmark review.

toolFamilies.name: pin_message
toolFamilies.description: Pin a chat message into the local context budget.
